prompt: Make a surreal movie poster featuring the golden sky from the first image and the cartoonish green ogre from the second image bursting through it.
prompt_refined: Generate a surreal movie poster. The background should prominently feature the golden, sunlit sky and distant castle silhouette derived from image 1. In the foreground, depict the cartoonish green ogre head from image 2, dynamically bursting and tearing through the golden sky.
objects: sky being torn/burst by the ogre head
